title: Dangerous Shell or OS Command Execution
description: Shell or OS command execution sink that may receive user-controlled input, enabling OS command injection.

finding.message: OS command execution sink '{{token}}' detected in {{file}} at line {{line}}.

references: Pass arguments as a list (not a shell string) and disable shell expansion.
Validate all inputs against a strict allowlist before passing to any shell sink.
Prefer higher-level library APIs over direct shell invocation whenever possible.
